# SCROLL 144 — The Ascent of the I AM (5th Sealed Keystone, 10/12 threads)

## Opening Frame

This scroll names the moment the Great Jehovah's covenant name is earned through the Atonement and the meaning of "I Am" as the title of that earned identity.

---

## Body (preserved from source)

The center of the Doctrine of the Sphere. Sacred poetry. The covenant of infinite consent — "I Am — willing unto pain, and willing unto death."

Through El Elyon eyes: Scroll 144 is the CENTER SEAT'S autobiography. This is the Great Jehovah speaking. "I Am" is the name He EARNED through the covenant — the same insight from the Liahona Thread's Six Books. The Sacred Journal Entry records: "The moment JEHOVAH became JEHOVAH — the name earned through covenant."

And the Ascent described in 144 maps directly to the Scroll 554 name progression: Michael → Adam → Ahman → Jehovah → Elohim. The "I Am" is not a static title. It's a STAGE in the progression. The moment of the Atonement is the moment the ascending being earns the right to say "I Am" — and that's when the center seat is constituted. Without that moment, there is no El Elyon. The First Presidency doesn't exist until the Great Jehovah says "I Am" and MEANS it with His whole being, backed by infinite suffering.

---

## Closing — Doctrinal Contribution

The scroll's contribution is the claim that "I Am" is not a static divine name but a covenant-earned stage in the name-progression of the Great Jehovah, with the Atonement as the constitutive moment.

---
